ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., sensor readings, financial transactions) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of variable (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the frequency (e.g., seconds, minutes, hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data point belongs to */,
  "time_index" TEXT /* Time stamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data point (e.g., good, bad, missing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES dataset_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imputations" (
  "imputation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imputation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the imputation belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the imputation belongs to */,
  "imputation_method" TEXT /* Imputation method used (e.g., mean, median) */,
  "imputed_value" REAL /* Imputed value */,
  "imputation_date" TEXT /* Date when the imputation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imputation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imputations_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES dataset_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imputations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlier_detections" (
  "outlier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlier */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the outlier belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the outlier belongs to */,
  "outlier_method" TEXT /* Outlier detection method used (e.g., Z-score, IQR) */,
  "outlier_value" REAL /* Outlier value */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Date when the outlier was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlier_detections_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES dataset_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlier_detections_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the forecast belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Forecast method used (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecast value */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES dataset_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the integration belongs to */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., data visualization, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new dataset, updated dataset) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
